description: CompositionPurple and green printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a slit, three quarter sleeves, tape detail and pane stitch on the front yoke and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironEvery girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aurelia have been inspired by the street fads that are currently trending and have added this to their latest collection. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
